extraction.one_line_summary: LUCHENKO Alexei attacked before the final 10% climb, dropped companions on the 20% descent, won solo at Alcossebre.
tactical_patterns: LUCHENKO attacked pre-climb rather than on the 10% ascent itself, leveraging tailwind and 20% descent skills.
Team Sky controlled peloton despite knowing break would succeed, prioritizing time gaps over stage contention.
CONTADOR positioned at front of favorites group signals returning form after quiet opening week.

rider_signals.LUCHENKO Alexei: positive: U23 world champion progression confirmed by attacking before steep climb and descending away from specialists
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: positive: Leading favorites group through finish suggests improved condition after early Vuelta struggles
rider_signals.FROOME Christopher: positive: Gained 8 seconds on VAN GARDEREN despite not contesting stage, active team control throughout
rider_signals.CHAVEZ Esteban: positive: Jumped from 6th to 3rd GC, suggesting better form than opening stages indicated
